# Project Context: server-hardening

<!-- Auto-generated by /cortex-spec from spec artifacts. -->
<!-- All agents reference this file for project-level conventions. -->

## Tech Stack

- **OS:** Ubuntu 24.04.3 LTS Noble Numbat, kernel 6.8.0-107-generic
- **Container runtime:** Docker CE (community edition), ~40-container compose stack
- **Reverse proxy:** Caddy (running in Docker, config in agent-stack repo)
- **Services:** Icecast, Liquidsoap, codex-bridge, gemini-bridge, litellm, cost-dashboard, health-monitor, MCP server, magmalab-flower, web frontend (Flask on :9093)
- **Firewall:** UFW (user-space front-end to iptables)
- **Hardening tools to install:** fail2ban, auditd
- **Pentest tools:** nmap, testssl.sh, nuclei, lynis
- **Process management:** systemd (`Restart=always` for all host services)
- **DNS/proxy:** Cloudflare (proxied; trusted_proxies configured in Caddyfile)

## Conventions

- **Docker config location:** `/home/agent/agent-stack/` — docker-compose files and Caddyfile
- **Caddy restarts:** Must use `docker compose restart caddy` — never `caddy reload` (inode change rule)
- **Caddyfile validate before restart:** `docker exec caddy caddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile`
- **Docker bridge CIDR:** `172.18.0.0/16` (`agent-stack_default`) — UFW rules must preserve allow from this range for host services
- **Icecast source password:** always from `ICECAST_SOURCE_PASSWORD` env var — never hardcoded
- **Web frontend:** Flask on port 9093, bound to 0.0.0.0, UFW allows from Docker bridge — this binding must be preserved
- **Systemd:** All host services use `Restart=always` — hardening must not break unit files

## Architecture Rules

- SSH password auth and root login are disabled as part of this spec — key-based auth only
- Only Caddy's ports 80 and 443 should bind to `0.0.0.0`; all other Docker services bind to `127.0.0.1`
- DOCKER-USER iptables chain must not be modified by this spec — the durable fix is docker-compose port rebinding
- sysctl changes go in `/etc/sysctl.d/99-hardening.conf` — never edit base `/etc/sysctl.conf`
- fail2ban must use `banaction = ufw` to integrate with existing UFW setup
- Security headers applied via Caddy global snippet (`(security_headers)`), imported per vhost — not inline per route

## Write Boundaries

- `/etc/ssh/sshd_config` and `/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/50-cloud-init.conf`
- `/etc/sysctl.d/99-hardening.conf` (new file)
- `/etc/fail2ban/jail.local` (new file)
- `/home/agent/agent-stack/docker-compose.yml` (and sibling compose files)
- `/home/agent/agent-stack/Caddyfile` (or equivalent path)
- `docs/findings/server-hardening-pentest-YYYYMMDD.md` (new file)
- UFW logging level (via `ufw` CLI)
- systemd: enable/start auditd, fail2ban, sshd restart
